---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Link to any relevant EU Regulation 2023/1669 requirements if applicable.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Include any API, UI, or behavioral details.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, related issues, or any other context.
